_comment: Copy to virio.config.json (or virio.local.json) and fill in. Load with Virio.fromConfigFile(). Secrets and RPC URLs can also come from env: VIRIO_PRIVATE_KEY, VIRIO_RPC_URL, VIRIO_CONFIG.

_multiChainExample._comment: Alternative shape for multiple chains. Set defaultChain and a chains map; pass { chain } to fromConfigFile() to override the selection.
